landing.title: OpenFarmPlanner
landing.subtitle: Simple crop planning for vegetable production, CSA, and small farms.
landing.description: OpenFarmPlanner helps manage crops, growing areas, and cultivation periods in a clear way. Keep plans, fields, and key information organized in one place.

items.structuredDocumentation: Document cultivation data in a structured way

items.digitalPlanningProjects: projects that want to organize cultivation planning digitally

statusNote: OpenFarmPlanner is currently in beta and is being continuously improved.
